_meta.author: tgd1975
_meta.tested: macOS 14, Lightroom Classic 13.x / Windows 11, Lightroom Classic 13.x

profiles.name: 01 Culling
profiles.description: Speed up photo culling in Adobe Lightroom Classic. Button A flags the current photo as a Pick (P key — default Lightroom shortcut). Button B rejects it (X key). Button C moves to the next photo (Right Arrow). Button D moves to the previous photo (Left Arrow). No configuration needed — all are built-in Lightroom shortcuts.
